# Obligatory Mermaid Architecture Documentation

## Minimum Required Diagrams
Always include:
1. High-level system context diagram
2. Component/module interaction diagram
3. Runtime flow diagram for key user or service paths

## Standards
- Use Mermaid diagrams in markdown code fences.
- Keep node names aligned with real package/module/service names.
- Update diagrams whenever architecture-relevant code changes.

## Preferred Mermaid Types
- `flowchart` for process and request flow
- `sequenceDiagram` for time-ordered service interactions
- `classDiagram` for domain structure
- `graph TD` or `graph LR` for dependency overview

## Output Expectation
- Add or update architecture docs with the required Mermaid diagrams.
- Explicitly note what changed and why.
